textPlain: On the one hand, sure. On the other hand, the original issue he's complaining about is:> Copilot in Agent mode diffs become hard to comprehend #260436> Steps to Reproduce:>  1. Try vibe coding like activity>  2. See how the edits become hard to comprehendAnd when a bot asked for more details, linking to a human-written document which explicitly mentions things like VSCode version, and "what you actually saw", he did not reply. It's a garbage bug report, and it's quite right that it was closed.
